title: About Us Blurb
description:
We exist to make every healthcare organization the most advanced, intelligent, and human-centered system in the world, where AI eliminates friction, providers focus on care, and patients receive higher-quality outcomes at lower costs.
Born in Silicon Valley with an engineering-first DNA, we take an “anti-outsourced” approach and maintain the highest engineering-to-operator ratio in the industry. This gives us the agility to solve healthcare’s most complex challenges, directly with AI and model development that is built, not borrowed.
Today, we power 150+ enterprise health systems, including 5 of the top 10 largest health systems and 5 of the top 10 children’s hospitals in the U.S. We are privileged to partner with Vizient, AWS, and HATCo, and backed by some of the world’s most respected investors - General Catalyst, Sequoia, NVIDIA, and Human Capital. Our impact is already measurable, but our work is just beginning.
